---
title: "Clean and Combine Archive Data"
output: html_notebook
---

## Libraries

```{r}
library(googlesheets4)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Sheets Connection

```{r}
gs4_auth(email = "") 
```


## Season 14

```{r warning=FALSE}
sheet_id_14 = "1m45w0hQOkvUFvNpc5MwQcN4snGs0Lkrb6kJfOUJf6tw"

#Share Numbers tab
sn_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'share_numbers'
                ,col_types = 'icccicD-'
)

#Farmer Produce tab
fp_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'farm_produce'
                ,skip = 1
                ,col_types = 'icccnnnnncD'
)

#Weekly Share Lists tab
wsl_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                 ,sheet = 'weekly_share_lists'
                 ,col_types = 'iccicin--D'
)

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
is_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'inv_sales'
                ,col_types = 'iccnnccD--'
)

#Master Item List tab
mil_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                 ,sheet = 'master_item_list'
                 ,col_types = 'cccccccnccD'
)

#Share List tab
################
sl_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'share_list'
                ,col_types = 'ccnD'
)

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
sr_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'share_rotation'
                ,col_types = '----Dicic----------'
)

#Farmer List tab
################
fl_14 = range_read(sheet_id_14
                ,sheet = 'farmer_list'
                ,col_types = 'ccccccD'
)

#Produce Per List tab
################

rm(sheet_id_14)

```

## Season 15

```{r}
sheet_id_15 = "125T2Gz-LJ9hyVivRasRD-Uzm-avJIbJfKN2ACqNrHM0"

#Share Numbers tab
sn_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'share_numbers'
                ,col_types = 'icccicD-'
)

#Farmer Produce tab
fp_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'farm_produce'
                ,skip = 1
                ,col_types = 'icccnnnnncD'
)

#Weekly Share Lists tab
wsl_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                 ,sheet = 'weekly_share_lists'
                 ,col_types = 'iccicin--D'
)

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
is_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'inv_sales'
                ,col_types = 'iccnnccD--'
)

#Master Item List tab
mil_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                 ,sheet = 'master_item_list'
                 ,col_types = 'cccccccnccD'
)

#Share List tab
################
sl_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'share_list'
                ,col_types = 'ccnD'
)

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
sr_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'share_rotation'
                ,col_types = '----Dicic----------'
)

#Farmer List tab
################
fl_15 = range_read(sheet_id_15
                ,sheet = 'farmer_list'
                ,col_types = 'ccccccD'
)

#Produce Per List tab
################

rm(sheet_id_15)
```

## Combine Data

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
c_sn = sn_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(sn_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Farmer Produce tab
c_fp = fp_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(fp_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Weekly Share Lists tab
c_wsl = wsl_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(wsl_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
c_is = is_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(is_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Master Item List tab
c_mil = mil_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(mil_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Share List tab
################
c_sl = sl_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(sl_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
c_sr = sr_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(sr_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Farmer List tab
################
c_fl = fl_14 %>% 
  mutate(season = 's14') %>% 
  bind_rows(fl_15 %>% 
              mutate(season = 's15')
            )

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Clean Data

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
cc_sn = c_sn %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(week))

#Farmer Produce tab
cc_fp_v1 = c_fp %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  mutate(av_min = ifelse(is.na(av_min), 0, av_min)
         ,av_max = ifelse(is.na(av_max), 0, av_max)
         ,order = ifelse(is.na(order), 0, order)
         ,store = ifelse(is.na(store), 0, store)
         ,store_note = ifelse(is.na(store_note), '', store_note)) %>% 
  mutate(clean = ifelse(av_min > 0 | av_max > 0 | order > 0 | store > 0 | store_note != '', 1, 0)) 

stopifnot(cc_fp_v1 %>% filter(is.na(clean)) %>% summarise(n = n()) %>% pull == 0)

cc_fp = cc_fp_v1 %>% 
  filter(!is.na(item)) %>% 
  filter(clean == 1) %>% 
  select(-clean) %>% 
  mutate(store_note = ifelse(store_note == '', NA, store_note))

#Weekly Share Lists tab
cc_wsl = c_wsl %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(item) & !is.na(week) & !is.na(item_nu))

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
cc_is_v1 = c_is %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  rename(invent_manual = invent._manual) %>% 
  mutate(invent_from_farmigo = ifelse(is.na(invent_from_farmigo), 0, invent_from_farmigo)
         ,invent_manual = ifelse(is.na(invent_manual), 0, invent_manual)
         ,clean = ifelse(invent_from_farmigo > 0 | invent_manual > 0 | !is.na(inventory_note) | !is.na(sold), 1, 0) 
         )

stopifnot(cc_is_v1 %>% filter(is.na(clean)) %>% summarise(n = n()) %>% pull == 0)

cc_is = cc_is_v1 %>% 
  filter(clean == 1) %>% 
  select(-clean)

#Master Item List tab
cc_mil = c_mil %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(category) | !is.na(type) | !is.na(preferred_per_value))

#Share List tab
################
cc_sl = c_sl %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) 

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
cc_sr = c_sr %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) %>% 
  rename(week = 'week_#') 

#Farmer List tab
################
cc_fl = c_fl %>% 
  rename_all(tolower) %>% 
  select_all(funs(gsub(" ", "_", .))) 

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Add New Columns

```{r}
#Share Numbers tab
ccc_sn = cc_sn %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week')) %>% 
  mutate(season_week = paste0(str_replace(season,'s',''),'.',
                              ifelse(week < 0, '-01',
                                     ifelse(str_length(week)==1,paste0('0',week),week))
                              )
         )

#Farmer Produce tab
ccc_fp = cc_fp %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week')) %>% 
  mutate(season_week = paste0(str_replace(season,'s',''),'.',
                              ifelse(week < 0, '-01',
                                     ifelse(str_length(week)==1,paste0('0',week),week))
                              )
         )

#Weekly Share Lists tab
ccc_wsl = cc_wsl %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week')) %>% 
  mutate(season_week = paste0(str_replace(season,'s',''),'.',
                              ifelse(week < 0, '-01',
                                     ifelse(str_length(week)==1,paste0('0',week),week))
                              )
         )

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
ccc_is = cc_is  %>% 
  left_join(cc_sr %>% 
              select(season, week, date) %>% 
              distinct()
            , by = c('season','week')) %>% 
  mutate(season_week = paste0(str_replace(season,'s',''),'.',
                              ifelse(week < 0, '-01',
                                     ifelse(str_length(week)==1,paste0('0',week),week))
                              )
         )

#Master Item List tab
ccc_mil = cc_mil

#Share List tab
################
ccc_sl = cc_sl

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
ccc_sr = cc_sr %>% 
  mutate(season_week = paste0(str_replace(season,'s',''),'.',
                              ifelse(week < 0, '-01',
                                     ifelse(str_length(week)==1,paste0('0',week),week))
                              )
         )

#Farmer List tab
################
ccc_fl = cc_fl

#Produce Per List tab
################
```

## Create new data sets

```{r}
#Sales Only
ccc_so = ccc_is %>% 
  filter(!is.na(sold)) %>% 
  select(week, producer, item, sold, archive_date, season, date, season_week)

```

## Upload Data to Google Sheets

```{r}
sheet_id_ccc = "1xs8TAMrSsJuL_gou4y0DBH3IkaTH0eBn_pdboCGWFTI"

#Share Numbers tab
sheet_write(ccc_sn, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "share_numbers")

#Farmer Produce tab
sheet_write(ccc_fp, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "farm_produce")

#Weekly Share Lists tab
sheet_write(ccc_wsl, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "weekly_share_lists")

#Weekly Par tab
################

#Inventory Sales tab
sheet_write(ccc_is, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "inv_sales")

#Master Item List tab
sheet_write(ccc_mil, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "master_item_list")

#Share List tab
################
sheet_write(ccc_sl, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "share_list")

#Default Par tab
################

#Share Rotation tab
sheet_write(ccc_sr, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "share_rotation")

#Farmer List tab
################
sheet_write(ccc_fl, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "farmer_list")

#Produce Per List tab
################

############# New Tables ############# 
sheet_write(ccc_so, sheet_id_ccc, sheet = "sales_only")
```

## Data Checks

```{r}

```
